Delhi.attribution: Live data: Open-Meteo (air quality, weather, solar, flood / GloFAS). CC-BY 4.0.

recommendations.title: Issue public air-quality advisory (Very Unhealthy)
recommendations.action: Activate health advisory: recommend masks (N95) outdoors, move outdoor school/sports indoors, and open clean-air shelters.
recommendations.rationale: US AQI is 206 — 'Very Unhealthy'. Prolonged exposure risks respiratory harm.

recommendations.title: Activate heat action plan
recommendations.action: Open cooling centres, extend public-water access, adjust outdoor-worker hours, and run heat-risk messaging for vulnerable residents.

recommendations.title: Manage peak cooling demand
recommendations.action: Pre-cool public buildings in the morning, trim non-essential afternoon load, and stand up demand-response. Solar potential is high today — schedule flexible/industrial load into midday to soak up rooftop-solar output.
recommendations.rationale: Cooling degree-days at 14 °C·day signals heavy AC demand and grid stress.

Mumbai.attribution: Live data: Open-Meteo (air quality, weather, solar, flood / GloFAS). CC-BY 4.0.

recommendations.title: Raise flood watch on river reach
recommendations.action: Alert low-lying wards, pre-position pumps and rescue teams, and monitor upstream discharge hourly.
recommendations.rationale: River discharge spiked to 5.27 m³/s on 2026-06-30 (+3.4σ).

recommendations.title: Manage peak cooling demand
recommendations.action: Pre-cool public buildings in the morning, trim non-essential afternoon load, and stand up demand-response.
recommendations.rationale: Cooling degree-days at 8 °C·day signals heavy AC demand and grid stress.

recommendations.title: Issue UV / sun-safety advisory
recommendations.action: Advise midday shade, sunscreen and hydration; add shade at outdoor public venues.
recommendations.rationale: UV index reaches 8 — very high exposure risk.

London.attribution: Live data: Open-Meteo (air quality, weather, solar, flood / GloFAS). CC-BY 4.0.

recommendations.title: Capitalise on high solar output
recommendations.action: Shift shiftable municipal load (pumping, EV charging) into the midday solar peak.
recommendations.rationale: Solar energy potential is 24 MJ/m² — strong generation window.
